title: woodluv 4-Tier Shoe Rack, Shoe Storage Organiser, Wooden Storage Rack, Shoe Shelf for Hallway, Living Room, Plants Books, Bedroom,Bathroom - 69D x 26W x 80H cms
features: Woodluv 4 tier shoe rack and shelving unit - Perfect for all rooms of the house
MEASURES - Dimensions: 69 x 26 x 80cm (width x depth x height) Height of gap between shelves: 21cm
NATURAL - The shoe rack and shelving unit is made of Durable and Natural Bamboo Which is Strong and Robust design
MULTIPURPOSE - 4 shelf unit can hold a variety of objects including shoes, boots, plants, books, ornaments, towels, bathroom accessories, in fact almost anything that you can fit on the unit
QUALITIES - This material is washable, easy clean and anti-bacterial. Bamboo is 100% organic and entirely sustainable as no trees need to be cut down to produce this wonderful material.
description: Product Description Sleek Bamboo Shoe Rack: Natural Elegance for Your Entryway Introducing our versatile Bamboo Shoe Rack, available in natural shade, designed to add functionality and style to your living space. Crafted from durable bamboo, this multi-purpose shoe rack seamlessly blends into any décor while providing a practical storage solution for your footwear collection. Contemporary Convenience Modern Living Made Easy: Natural Bamboo Shoe Rack with Quick Assembly Assembling your new shoe rack is a breeze with our user-friendly design. The self-assembly process requires no advanced skills or expertise. We've included all the necessary tools and clear instructions to make the assembly process as straightforward as possible, ensuring you can enjoy your new storage solution in no time. With its multipurpose design, our Bamboo Shoe Rack offers endless possibilities to help you organize, decorate, and optimize every corner of your home with ease and elegance. Contemporary Convenience Modern Living Made Easy: Bamboo Shoe Rack with Quick Assembly Assembling your new shoe rack is a breeze with our user-friendly design. The self-assembly process requires no advanced skills or expertise. We've included all the necessary tools and clear instructions to make the assembly process as straightforward as possible, ensuring you can enjoy your new storage solution in no time. With its multipurpose design, our Bamboo Shoe Rack offers endless possibilities to help you organize, decorate, and optimize every corner of your home with ease and elegance. Stylish Simplicity: Natural Bamboo Shoe Rack with Slatted Shelves Transform this rack into a minimalist bookshelf to display your favorite reads or decorative items. The slatted design adds a modern flair to your home library or reading nook. Place it your entryway to store shoes OR as a catch-all for keys, mail, or other essentials, keeping your entry area tidy.
